use_codes.desc: LONG-TERM MAINTENANCE TREATMENT OF AIRFLOW OBSTRUCTION IN PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC OBSTRUCTIVE PULMONARY DISEASE (COPD)

indications.text:
SEEBRI™ NEOHALER® is indicated for the long-term, maintenance treatment of airflow obstruction in patients with
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and/or emphysema.

SEEBRI™ NEOHALER® is indicated for the long-term, maintenance treatment of airflow obstruction in patients with
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), including chronic bronchitis and/or emphysema.
